files.repo/src/shipkit/rating.py:
"""Rate computation."""

from shipkit._internal import billable_weight_oz, normalize_zone, validated_weight
from shipkit.models import Parcel, RateQuote

_BASE_RATE = {"local": 500, "regional": 800, "national": 1200}
_KNOWN_ZONES = frozenset(_BASE_RATE)


def compute_rate(parcel: Parcel, dest_zone: str) -> RateQuote:
    weight = validated_weight(parcel)
    zone = normalize_zone(dest_zone, known=_KNOWN_ZONES)
    billable = billable_weight_oz(parcel, weight)
    rate = _BASE_RATE[zone] + (billable - 1) * 50
    return RateQuote(zone=zone, rate_cents=rate, billable_weight_oz=billable)
